Jason Grilli

Position: Pitcher

Bats: Right  •  Throws: Right

6-5, 235lb (196cm, 106kg)

Born: November 11, 1976 in Royal Oak, MI us

Draft: Drafted by the New York Yankees in the 24th round of the 1994 MLB June Amateur Draft from Charles W. Baker HS (Baldwinsville, NY) and the San Francisco Giants in the 1st round (4th) of the 1997 MLB June Amateur Draft from Seton Hall University (South Orange, NJ).

High School: Charles W. Baker HS (Baldwinsville, NY)

School: Seton Hall University (South Orange, NJ)

Debut: May 11, 2000 (Age 23-182d, 17,651st in major league history)
   vs. ATL 6.2 IP, 11 H, 3 SO, 2 BB, 4 ER, W

Last Game: October 1, 2017 (Age 40-324d)
   vs. OAK 1.0 IP, 0 H, 1 SO, 0 BB, 0 ER

Rookie Status: Exceeded rookie limits during 2004 season

Agents: Gary Sheffield

Full Name: Jason Michael Grilli

Nicknames: Grill Cheese

Pronunciation: \GRILL-ee\

View Player Info from the B-R Bullpen

Relatives: Son of Steve Grilli

  • 1x All-Star

Frequently Asked Questions

How old is Jason Grilli?

Jason Grilli is 49 years old.

When was Jason Grilli born?

Jason Grilli was born on November 11, 1976.

Where was Jason Grilli born?

Jason Grilli was born in Royal Oak, MI.

How tall is Jason Grilli?

Jason Grilli is 6-5 (196 cm) tall.

How much did Jason Grilli weigh when playing?

Jason Grilli weighed 235 lbs (106 kg) when playing.

How many seasons did Jason Grilli play?

Jason Grilli played 15 seasons.

Is Jason Grilli in the Hall of Fame?

Jason Grilli has not been elected into the Hall of Fame.

When was Jason Grilli drafted?

Jason Grilli was drafted by the New York Yankees in the 24th round of the 1994 MLB June Amateur Draft from Charles W. Baker HS (Baldwinsville, NY) and the San Francisco Giants in the 1st round (4th) of the 1997 MLB June Amateur Draft from Seton Hall University (South Orange, NJ).

What position did Jason Grilli play?

Jason Grilli was a Pitcher.

How many strikeouts did Jason Grilli have?

Jason Grilli had 694 strikeouts over his career.

How many teams has Jason Grilli played for?

Jason Grilli played for 9 teams; the Los Angeles Angels of Anaheim, Atlanta Braves, Chicago White Sox, Colorado Rockies, Detroit Tigers, Florida Marlins, Pittsburgh Pirates, Texas Rangers and Toronto Blue Jays.

How many World Series has Jason Grilli won?

Jason Grilli has never won a World Series.

When did Jason Grilli retire?

Jason Grilli last played in 2017.

What are Jason Grilli's nicknames?

Grill Cheese is a nickname for Jason Grilli.
